creator: hetzels@westbend.net
text:
The attached diff upgrades cyrus-sasl to v1.5.15. 

cyrus-sasl 1.5.15 includes the configure fixes for the rsaref library,
and corrects the FALSE detection of KERBEROS V4, when the DES library is
not installed.  The pwcheck program now saves its process id tor
/var/run/pwcheck.pid - we were patching pwcheck to get this functionality.

Hopefully by the time v1.5.17 is available we'll be left with one/no patches.

Fix: NOTE FOR COMMITER
	After applying the attached diff, remove patch-ad and patch-ae.

Thanks

Scot W. Hetzel
